slides.title: There's a fire inside you can't *feel*.
slides.sub: Low-grade, body-wide inflammation quietly drives heart disease and aging. One blood test can put a number on it.

slides.title: Inflammation has no symptoms
slides.body: Chronic, low-level inflammation runs silently for years. You feel fine while it *quietly stresses* your arteries, organs and cells.

slides.title: hs-CRP puts a number on it
slides.body: High-sensitivity CRP is a simple blood test that measures *system-wide inflammation*, the kind too subtle for a standard panel to catch.

slides.title: It tracks with heart risk
slides.body: Higher hs-CRP *is linked to* greater risk of heart disease, even when cholesterol looks fine. It adds context numbers alone miss.

slides.title: This number can move
slides.body: Sleep, movement, and a less processed diet *may help* lower inflammation over time. hs-CRP shows whether your habits are working.

slides.title: Measure the unseen
slides.body: You cannot improve a fire you cannot see. A baseline number turns invisible inflammation into something you can *actually track*.

slides.title: Track the habits that *cool the fire*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your sleep, food, movement and steps in one daily number, so the habits linked to lower inflammation become easy to see.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Some of the biggest threats to your heart never make you feel sick. Inflammation is one of them. 🔥🌿

hs-CRP puts a number on the silent, body-wide inflammation linked to heart disease and aging, and the good news is that sleep, movement and food can move it. Save this for your next blood panel. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Silent Inflammation Test That Predicts Heart Risk
